    P

    paintComponent(Graphics) - Method in class scorefour.view.Panel
    Paints a Game to a Panel
    Panel - Class in scorefour.view
    A Panel which acts as the main rendering and input handler for a Game
    Panel(Game) - Constructor for class scorefour.view.Panel
    Constructs a new Panel.
    PANEL_HEIGHT - Static variable in class scorefour.core.Game
    PANEL_HEIGHT defines the height of the game panel.
    PANEL_WIDTH - Static variable in class scorefour.core.Game
    PANEL_WIDTH defines the width of the game panel.
    parse(String) - Method in class scorefour.commands.AddCommand
    Parsing splits a string into sections and checks if the input the user entered is a valid Command.
    parse(String) - Method in class scorefour.commands.ClearCommand
    Parsing splits a string into sections and checks if the input the user entered is a valid Command.

    Peg - Class in scorefour.model

    PegView - Class in scorefour.view
     
    PegView() - Constructor for class scorefour.view.PegView
     
    playEffect(int) - Method in class scorefour.controller.AudioController
    Plays the effect of the provided index.
    PLAYING - Enum constant in enum class scorefour.common.GameState
     
    PlayingController - Class in scorefour.controller
    PlayingController manages the play state interactions, updates, drawing, and user input handling.
    PlayingController(PlayingView) - Constructor for class scorefour.controller.PlayingController
    Constructs a PlayingController object with the given PlayingView.
    PlayingView - Class in scorefour.view
    PlayingView initializes fixed in-game visuals and provides a way to draw these graphics to a Panel.
    PlayingView() - Constructor for class scorefour.view.PlayingView
    Constructs a PlayingView which initializes a background image.
    playSong(int) - Method in class scorefour.controller.AudioController
    Plays the song of the provided index.
